ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials for the data source */,
  "connection_parameters" TEXT /* Connection parameters for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_properties" (
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object-property relationship */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the property value */,
  "trustworthiness" REAL /* Current trustworthiness score of the property value */,
  "old_trustworthiness" REAL /* Previous trustworthiness score of the property value */,
  "value_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the property value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_properties_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_properties_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trustworthiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trustworthiness score */,
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object-property relationship */,
  "trustworthiness" REAL /* Trustworthiness score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was assigned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the score change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trustworthiness_scores_object_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_property_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object-property relationship */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level */,
  "confidence_date" TEXT /* Date the confidence level was assigned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the confidence level change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_levels_object_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_property_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data event */,
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object-property relationship */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_events_object_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_property_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object-property relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the relationship */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_property_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data quality report */,
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object-property relationship */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_object_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_property_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_issues_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES data_quality_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source history entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_history_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage entry */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "processing_step" TEXT /* Processing step */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the processing step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the validation rule (e.g., range, format) */,
  "rule_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dashboard_configuration" TEXT /* Dashboard configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object-property relationship */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the data quality metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_object_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_property_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_refresh_history" (
  "refresh_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refresh entry */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "refresh_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the refresh */,
  "refresh_status" TEXT /* Status of the refresh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refresh_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_refresh_history_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES object_properties ("object_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_export_format" TEXT /* Format of the data export */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
